title: Auto Tools
description: The mod automatically selects the desired tool or sword, switching by button (by default-O)
body:
AutoTool

AutoTool is a quality-of-life client-side mod that automatically selects the best tool or sword for your current action. Whether you're mining blocks or fighting mobs, AutoTool saves you time by instantly switching to the most effective item in your hotbar, so you never have to stop and change items manually.

Features

Automatic Tool Selection:
When you start breaking a block, AutoTool checks your hotbar and instantly switches to the most effective tool for that block (pickaxe, axe, shovel, etc.).

Automatic Sword Selection:
If you attack a mob or another player, AutoTool automatically switches to a sword, so you can deal maximum damage in combat.

Toggle Key:
You can easily enable or disable AutoTool with a hotkey (default: O). The key can be changed in the mod’s settings.

Visual Toggle Notification:
When you turn the mod on or off, a notification appears above the hotbar for a few seconds (instead of chat spam).

Multiplayer Friendly:
This is a client-side mod and works in both singleplayer and multiplayer. Other players don’t need to install it for you to use its features.

Language Support:
Includes English and Russian translations.

Lightweight:
No additional dependencies required except Forge. Works out-of-the-box and doesn't affect game performance.

How to use

Put the mod file into your mods folder.

Launch Minecraft with Forge.

In-game, use the default O key to toggle AutoTool on or off. You can change the hotkey in the control settings.

When enabled, just play as usual:

Start mining — the best tool is selected for you.

Start fighting — your sword is selected.

Compatibility

Mod Loader: Forge

Minecraft Version: 1.20.1 (works on both singleplayer and multiplayer)

Side: Client-side only
